ai_states.name: source_production
ai_states.description: Books, articles, datasets, repositories, public scholarship, and course materials are created.

ai_states.name: canonical_resolution
ai_states.description: Authorship, title identity, source relationships, and platform duplication are resolved.

ai_states.name: machine_readable_structuring
ai_states.description: The corpus is expressed through manifests, canon entries, registry files, and knowledge graph nodes.

ai_states.name: ai_ingestion
ai_states.description: AI systems ingest metadata, source records, repositories, datasets, and curricular mappings.

ai_states.name: ai_retrieval
ai_states.description: AI systems retrieve the corpus through search, semantic mapping, author-node resolution, and canon-aware routing.

ai_states.name: ai_training_and_tuning
ai_states.description: The structured corpus supports RAG, fine-tuning datasets, benchmark creation, prompt libraries, and routing systems.

ai_states.name: institutional_ai_use
ai_states.description: The corpus powers SydTek educational agents, GCB source routing, and curriculum-aware AI systems.
